elementary.title: A2 Comparative and superlative adjectives and adverbs
elementary.content:
📌 Định nghĩa
Chúng ta dùng so sánh hơn (comparative) để so sánh hai người/vật. Chúng ta dùng so sánh nhất (superlative) để so sánh ba người/vật trở lên và chỉ ra người/vật nổi bật nhất.
🔤 Hình thức tính từ so sánh (Comparative adjectives)
Loại tính từComparativeSuperlativeVí dụ
1 âm tiết ngắn+ -erthe + -esttall → taller → the tallest
Kết thúc bằng -e+ -rthe + -stnice → nicer → the nicest
Kết thúc CVC (phụ âm-nguyên âm-phụ âm)gấp đôi phụ âm cuối + -ergấp đôi + -estbig → bigger → the biggest
Kết thúc bằng -y-y → -ier-y → -iesthappy → happier → the happiest
2 âm tiết trở lênmore + adjthe most + adjexpensive → more expensive → the most expensive
Bất quy tắc——good→better→best / bad→worse→worst / far→farther→farthest
📝 Cách dùng comparative
• Dùng than sau so sánh hơn: My bag is bigger than yours.
• Dùng much / a lot / a bit để nhấn mạnh mức độ: He's a bit taller than me. Florence is much more interesting than Pisa.
📝 Cách dùng superlative
• Trước superlative luôn dùng the: She is the best student.
• Dùng in trước tên địa danh hoặc danh từ chỉ nhóm: the highest mountain in the world / the best student in the class.
• Dùng superlative với present perfect + ever: This is the best movie I've ever watched.
🔤 So sánh trạng từ (Comparative adverbs)
• Trạng từ kết thúc bằng -ly dùng more / the most: She drives more carefully than him. He works the most slowly.
• Trạng từ có cùng dạng với tính từ (fast, hard, late, early) dùng -er / -est: She runs faster than me. He works the hardest.
• Bất quy tắc: well → better → the best / badly → worse → the worst

exercises.q: This coffee is ___ than that one.
exercises.exp: Tính từ 1 âm tiết: hot → hotter

exercises.q: She is the ___ student in the class.
My brother is ___ than me.
This is ___ film I've ever seen.
exercises.opts: a good,the better,the best,the most good
exercises.exp: Superlative bất quy tắc: good → the best

exercises.q: London is ___ expensive than my city.
He drives ___ than his sister.
This book is ___ than that one.
She's ___ in the family.
He runs ___ than me.
Yesterday was ___ day of the year.
This road is ___ than the other one.
She works ___ than anyone else.
He speaks English ___ than his brother.
Paris is one of ___ cities in Europe.
exercises.opts: the most beautiful,most beautiful,more beautiful,the beautifulest

exercises.q: Today is ___ than yesterday.
This exercise was ___ than I thought.
He is ___ person I know.
She arrived ___ than him.
This is ___ I've ever eaten.
exercises.exp: Superlative bất quy tắc: bad → worst

exercises.q: He plays football ___ than his teammates.
My sister is ___ (tall) than me.
This is ___ (expensive) restaurant in town.
He works ___ (hard) than his colleagues.
She is ___ (happy) now than before.
This is ___ (good) film I've ever seen.
exercises.exp: Superlative bất quy tắc: good → the best

exercises.q: He drives ___ (carefully) than his father.
Tokyo is ___ (big) city in Japan.
She runs ___ (fast) than her sister.
This exercise is ___ (difficult) than the last one.
He is ___ (bad) player in the team.
exercises.exp: Superlative bất quy tắc: bad → the worst

exercises.q: Today is ___ (hot) day this summer.
She speaks ___ (quietly) than her boss.
My house is ___ (small) than yours.
He arrived ___ (late) than we expected.
This is ___ (interesting) book I've ever read.
She is ___ (young) of all the teachers.
He plays ___ (well) than anyone else.
This road is ___ (wide) than the other one.
She is ___ (beautiful) woman in the room.
He got up ___ (early) than his brother.

reorder.words: She is taller than her sister
This is the most expensive hotel in town
He works harder than anyone else
Tokyo is the biggest city in Japan
She drives more carefully than her brother
This is the best film I have ever seen
My house is smaller than yours
He plays football better than his teammates
London is more interesting than my city
She arrived earlier than him
This exercise is more difficult than the last one
He is the tallest in the family
She speaks more quietly than her boss
It is the worst weather of the year
He runs faster than his classmates
Paris is one of the most beautiful cities in Europe
Today is hotter than yesterday
She is the happiest person I know
This book is more boring than that one
He woke up later than usual

passage.text: My two brothers are very different. Tom is {{1}} (tall) than Mike, but Mike is {{2}} (fast) runner in the family. Tom is also {{3}} (lazy) than Mike. Mike always wakes up {{4}} (early) and works {{5}} (hard) than anyone else. Tom thinks that school is {{6}} (boring) thing in the world, but Mike says it is {{7}} (interesting) place he knows. Our sister Anna is {{8}} (young) of us all, but she is {{9}} (good) student. She speaks English {{10}} (fluently) than all of us.

Last summer, we visited three cities. Rome was {{1}} (hot) than Paris. However, London was {{2}} (cold) of the three. The food in Rome was {{3}} (delicious) than in London. Paris had {{4}} (expensive) restaurants, but also {{5}} (cheap) cafés. Rome's streets were {{6}} (narrow) than Paris's. I walked {{7}} (slowly) in Rome because I wanted to see everything. The museums in Paris were {{8}} (big) than those in Rome. London had {{9}} (modern) transport system. It was {{10}} (good) holiday of my life.

My new phone is {{1}} (good) than my old one. It is also {{2}} (light) and {{3}} (thin) model in the shop. The screen is {{4}} (large) than before. The camera takes {{5}} (clear) photos than any phone I've had. The battery lasts {{6}} (long) than my old phone. It charges {{7}} (quickly) too. However, it was {{8}} (expensive) phone I have ever bought. My friend has {{9}} (cheap) phone, but it works {{10}} (badly) than mine.

In our class, there are many different students. Maria is {{1}} (quiet) student — she never speaks loudly. Peter is {{2}} (noisy) than anyone. He always laughs {{3}} (loudly) than the teacher. Anna studies {{4}} (hard) of all. She always arrives {{5}} (early) and leaves {{6}} (late). Tom is {{7}} (funny) person in the class. His jokes are {{8}} (creative) than Peter's. Our teacher says this is {{9}} (talented) class she has ever taught. The exams are getting {{10}} (difficult) every month.

The two restaurants on our street are very different. 'La Roma' is {{1}} (expensive) than 'The Noodle House'. But 'The Noodle House' is {{2}} (popular) restaurant in the area. The food at 'La Roma' is {{3}} (fancy) and the portions are {{4}} (small). At 'The Noodle House', the service is {{5}} (fast) and the staff are {{6}} (friendly) than at 'La Roma'. 'La Roma' has {{7}} (beautiful) decoration. 'The Noodle House' has {{8}} (simple) menu but it is {{9}} (easy) to order. I always choose {{10}} (cheap) option, so I go to 'The Noodle House'.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh hai thành phố mà bạn biết hoặc đã từng đến thăm (về quy mô, thời tiết, con người, đồ ăn, phương tiện giao thông và những điểm du lịch nổi bật). Bạn thích thành phố nào hơn và tại sao?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Comparative and superlative adjectives and adverbs
writing_prompts.example: I would like to compare Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi. Ho Chi Minh City is much bigger and more modern than Hanoi. However, Hanoi has the most beautiful ancient streets I have ever seen. The food in Hanoi is cheaper but Ho Chi Minh City has friendlier people and better public transport. I prefer Ho Chi Minh City because it is livelier and more exciting.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả hai thành viên trong gia đình bạn và so sánh họ về tính cách, ngoại hình, sở thích và thói quen hàng ngày. Ai là người bạn nghĩ thú vị hơn và vì sao?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Comparative and superlative adjectives and adverbs
writing_prompts.example: My father and my uncle are very different. My father is taller than my uncle and he is more serious. My uncle is the funniest person in our family — he always makes everyone laugh. My father works harder and wakes up earlier than my uncle. However, my uncle is the most creative person I know. I think my uncle is more interesting because he tells the best stories.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn vừa mua một chiếc điện thoại mới. Hãy so sánh nó với chiếc điện thoại cũ của bạn về kích thước, camera, pin, tốc độ và giá cả. Chiếc nào tốt hơn?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Comparative and superlative adjectives and adverbs
writing_prompts.example: I just bought a new smartphone and it is much better than my old one. It is lighter and has the biggest screen I have ever seen. The camera takes clearer photos than before. The battery lasts longer and charges more quickly. It was more expensive than my old phone, but it has the best camera in its price range and runs faster. It is definitely worth the money.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh hai môn thể thao hoặc hoạt động mà bạn biết về độ khó, sự hấp dẫn, lợi ích sức khỏe và mức độ phổ biến. Bạn thích môn nào hơn?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Comparative and superlative adjectives and adverbs
writing_prompts.example: I want to compare swimming and running. Running is easier to start because you do not need much equipment. However, swimming is harder to learn at first. Swimming is healthier than running because it burns more calories and is better for your joints. Running is the most popular sport in my city. I think swimming is more exciting and more fun, so I prefer it.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả người giáo viên giỏi nhất mà bạn từng có và so sánh với một giáo viên khác. Điều gì làm cho người đó trở thành giáo viên tốt nhất?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Comparative and superlative adjectives and adverbs
writing_prompts.example: The best teacher I have ever had was Mr. Nam. He was the most patient teacher in our school and he explained grammar more clearly than anyone else. His lessons were more creative and more enjoyable than other classes. He spoke more slowly so everyone could understand. He was the most inspiring person I knew and he made learning English much more interesting. He worked harder than any other teacher I have met.

elementary.title: A2 No longer, any longer, anymore
elementary.content:
📌 Định nghĩa
Chúng ta dùng no longer, any longer và anymore để nói về điều gì đó đã đúng hoặc đã xảy ra trong quá khứ nhưng hiện tại không còn xảy ra hoặc không còn đúng nữa. Nghĩa của ba cụm này giống nhau nhưng cách dùng khác nhau.
🔵 No longer — câu khẳng định (Positive sentences)
• No longer chỉ dùng trong câu khẳng định vì bản thân nó đã mang nghĩa phủ định.
• Vị trí: giữa câu (mid position) — giữa chủ ngữ và động từ chính.
   I no longer eat meat. / He no longer plays football.
• Với động từ to be: vị trí sau be: We are no longer friends.
• Với động từ khuyết thiếu/trợ động từ: vị trí sau modal/auxiliary: Jim will no longer attend his lessons.
• No longer mang tính trang trọng (formal) hơn any longer / anymore.
🔴 Any longer / Anymore — câu phủ định và câu hỏi
• Any longer và anymore chỉ dùng trong câu phủ định hoặc câu hỏi.
• Vị trí: cuối câu (end position).
   We don't live there any longer / anymore.
   He isn't interested any longer / anymore.
   Do you still go there? — No, I don't go there anymore.
• Any longer hơi trang trọng hơn anymore.
• ⚠️ Anymore (1 từ) = thời gian | Any more (2 từ) = số lượng: I don't want any more coffee.
📊 Bảng tổng hợp
Cụm từLoại câuVị tríVí dụ
no longerKhẳng địnhGiữa câuShe no longer works here.
any longerPhủ định / HỏiCuối câuShe doesn't work here any longer.
anymorePhủ định / HỏiCuối câuShe doesn't work here anymore.

exercises.q: I ___ eat fast food. I'm on a diet.
exercises.exp: no longer + câu khẳng định, giữa câu

exercises.q: She doesn't live in Paris ___.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: He ___ plays for the national team.
exercises.exp: no longer ở giữa câu khẳng định

exercises.q: We aren't friends ___.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: They ___ sell that product.
Do you still go to that gym? — No, I don't go there ___.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: She is ___ a student. She graduated last year.
exercises.exp: no longer sau be trong câu khẳng định

exercises.q: I can't wait ___. I have to go.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: He will ___ attend these meetings.
exercises.exp: no longer sau modal verb will

exercises.q: They don't speak to each other ___.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: My grandfather ___ drives. He's too old.
exercises.exp: no longer ở giữa câu khẳng định

exercises.q: I don't want to argue ___.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: She has ___ interest in cooking.
exercises.exp: no longer sau have, giữa câu

exercises.q: He can ___ come. He's moved to another city.
exercises.exp: no longer sau modal verb can

exercises.q: I don't enjoy that TV show ___.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: The old market ___ exists. They built a mall there.
exercises.exp: no longer ở giữa câu khẳng định

exercises.q: We don't go to that restaurant ___. It closed down.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: She ___ wants to be a doctor.
Do you still like him? — No, I don't like him ___.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu hỏi/phủ định

exercises.q: My cat ___ sleeps in my bed. She prefers the sofa.
exercises.exp: no longer ở giữa câu khẳng định

exercises.q: He ___ works here. He got a new job.
exercises.exp: no longer ở giữa câu khẳng định

exercises.q: I don't eat meat ___.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: She is ___ a child. She's 20 now.
They don't live together ___.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: I ___ like coffee. I prefer tea.
He can't run very fast ___. He hurt his knee.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: We will ___ accept late homework.
She doesn't go to that school ___.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: He ___ smokes. He quit last year.
I can't stay ___. I have a meeting.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: They are ___ married. They divorced.
I don't watch that programme ___.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: My sister ___ plays the piano. She's too busy.
He doesn't call me ___.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: The shop is ___ open. It closed last month.
She has ___ interest in that hobby.
We don't see each other ___.
exercises.exp: any longer ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: I ___ believe in that. Things have changed.
He doesn't want to talk about it ___.
exercises.exp: anymore ở cuối câu phủ định

exercises.q: She will ___ be responsible for this project.

reorder.words: I no longer eat meat
She doesn't work here anymore
He is no longer a student
They don't speak to each other any longer
She no longer lives in London
I can't wait any longer I have to go
He will no longer attend these meetings
We don't go there anymore
My grandfather no longer drives a car
They are no longer friends
She no longer wants to be a nurse
I don't enjoy that show anymore
He no longer plays for the team
The old café is no longer open
I can no longer run very fast
She doesn't call me any longer
We will no longer accept late work
He no longer smokes cigarettes
I no longer believe in that
They don't sell that product any longer

passage.text: Ten years ago, my life was very different. I {{1}} lived in a small village, but I {{2}} live there {{3}}. I {{4}} worked on a farm, but I {{5}} work there {{6}} — I have a job in the city now. My old friends {{7}} call each other {{8}}, which is sad. My sister {{9}} goes to school {{10}} because she graduated last year. Life changes a lot!

My friend Tom has changed a lot. He {{1}} plays video games. He {{2}} goes to the gym instead. He {{3}} eats junk food {{4}} — he cooks healthy meals. He {{5}} stays up late {{6}}. His old friends say they {{7}} recognise him {{8}}. He {{9}} works at the café — he has a better job. He {{10}} smokes either.

The old neighbourhood has changed. The bakery on the corner {{1}} exists {{2}}. The park {{3}} has a playground — they built a car park there. Children {{4}} play in the street {{5}} because it's too busy. The Nguyen family {{6}} lives here {{7}}. They moved abroad. Old Mr. Lee {{8}} sits outside his house in the evenings {{9}}. The community {{10}} feels the same as it used to.

My relationship with my old hobby has changed. I used to love painting, but I {{1}} paint {{2}}. I don't have time {{3}}. My art supplies are {{4}} in my room — I put them in storage. My teacher says I {{5}} have the same skill {{6}}. She doesn't teach painting {{7}}. The art club at school {{8}} meets on Fridays {{9}}. I miss it, but I {{10}} have time to join.

The company has changed its policies. Employees {{1}} work from home {{2}}. The company {{3}} allows flexible hours. The old manager {{4}} works there {{5}}. The team {{6}} uses paper documents {{7}} — everything is digital now. Meetings {{8}} last three hours {{9}}, which everyone is happy about. The old staff canteen {{10}} exists — there is a new one.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả cách cuộc sống của bạn đã thay đổi so với 3-5 năm trước. Có ít nhất 5 thói quen, sở thích hoặc tình huống mà bạn không còn làm/có nữa. Giải thích tại sao mọi thứ thay đổi và bạn cảm thấy thế nào về sự thay đổi đó.
writing_prompts.example: My life has changed a lot in the past five years. I no longer go to school — I am at university now. I don't play video games anymore because I am too busy with my studies. My best friend moved abroad, so we no longer meet every weekend. I can't stay up any longer watching movies on weekdays because I wake up early. I no longer feel like a child. I miss the old days, but I am happy with my life now.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả những thay đổi lớn trong khu phố, ngôi trường hoặc thị trấn nơi bạn lớn lên. Những gì không còn tồn tại nữa? Bạn nhớ điều gì nhất? Có ít nhất 4 chi tiết cụ thể.
hint_words: we can't play there any longer
our favourite café is no longer
writing_prompts.example: The neighbourhood where I grew up has changed a lot. The old playground no longer exists — they built apartments there. My favourite bakery is no longer open because the owner retired. The street market doesn't operate any longer. My old primary school no longer has the big garden we used to play in. I can no longer find the small bookshop where I bought my first storybook. I miss all these things so much.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một mối quan hệ bạn bè hoặc thành viên gia đình mà bạn không còn gặp thường xuyên nữa. Tại sao? Bạn có tiếc không? Bạn vẫn giữ liên lạc bằng cách nào?
hint_words: I don't hear from him anymore
writing_prompts.example: My best friend Anna and I used to be inseparable. We no longer live in the same city because she moved to another country for university. We don't see each other anymore except online. We no longer go to the same café every Saturday. I can't call her easily any longer because of the time difference. She no longer sends letters. I don't hear from her as often anymore, but I still miss her every day.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả cách một người nổi tiếng (ca sĩ, cầu thủ, diễn viên...) mà bạn yêu thích đã thay đổi sự nghiệp. Những gì họ không còn làm nữa? Sự nghiệp của họ thay đổi như thế nào?
hint_words: is no longer in the team
writing_prompts.example: One of my favourite singers changed a lot over the years. She no longer sings the same style of music — she moved from pop to jazz. She doesn't release albums as often anymore. She is no longer in the same band and doesn't perform in big stadiums any longer. Her old fans don't follow her music anymore, which is sad. However, she no longer cares about being famous — she just makes music she loves. I still remember her first song and I think she is still wonderful.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả những thói quen sức khỏe cũ của bạn và cách bạn đã thay đổi chúng. Những thói quen xấu nào bạn không còn có nữa? Những gì mới bạn đã bắt đầu?
hint_words: can't ignore my health any longer
don't eat fast food any longer
writing_prompts.example: A year ago, I had very unhealthy habits. I no longer eat junk food every day — I now cook healthy meals. I don't stay up past midnight anymore. I no longer skip breakfast, which used to be my worst habit. I can't ignore my health any longer because I had a bad cold last winter. I no longer drink too much coffee. I don't feel tired anymore because I sleep better and exercise regularly. These changes have made me much happier.

elementary.title: A2 However, although, because, so, and time connectors
elementary.content:
📌 Định nghĩa
Connectors (từ nối) giúp chúng ta kết nối các ý tưởng và làm câu tiếng Anh tự nhiên hơn. Ở trình độ A2, chúng ta cần nắm vững các từ nối quan trọng: because, so, although, however và các từ nối thời gian (time connectors).
🟡 Because — Nguyên nhân (Reason)
• Dùng because để diễn đạt lý do / nguyên nhân của điều gì đó.
• Dùng ở giữa hoặc đầu câu.
   I stayed home because it was raining.
   Because she was tired, she went to bed early.
🟢 So — Kết quả (Result)
• Dùng so để diễn đạt kết quả / hệ quả của điều gì đó.
• Luôn đứng giữa hai mệnh đề, có dấu phẩy trước.
   It was raining, so we stayed inside.
   He was hungry, so he made a sandwich.
🔵 Although — Tương phản (Contrast — trong cùng câu)
• Dùng although để diễn đạt sự tương phản / đối lập trong cùng một câu.
• Có thể đứng đầu câu hoặc giữa câu.
   Although she was tired, she kept working.
   She kept working, although she was tired.
• ≈ even though (dùng khi muốn nhấn mạnh hơn)
🟣 However — Tương phản (Contrast — giữa hai câu)
• Dùng however để nối hai câu riêng biệt mang nghĩa đối lập.
• Thường đứng đầu câu thứ hai, theo sau là dấu phẩy.
   I studied hard. However, I failed the exam.
   He is small. However, he plays basketball very well.
⏰ Time connectors — Từ nối thời gian
Từ nốiNghĩaVí dụ
whenkhiCall me when you arrive.
beforetrước khiBrush your teeth before you go to bed.
aftersau khiWe ate dinner after the film.
whiletrong khiI listened to music while I cooked.
untilcho đến khiWait until I come back.
as soon asngay khiCall me as soon as you arrive.

exercises.q: I was tired, ___ I went to bed early.
She passed the exam ___ she didn't study much.
exercises.exp: although = tương phản trong cùng câu

exercises.q: I stayed home ___ it was raining.
He is very young. ___, he is very experienced.
exercises.exp: However = tương phản giữa hai câu riêng

exercises.q: ___ she was sick, she went to work.
Call me ___ you arrive.
The film was boring. ___, we watched it until the end.
exercises.exp: However = tương phản giữa hai câu

exercises.q: She cried ___ she heard the sad news.
We ate dinner ___ we watched the film.
He didn't call me ___ he promised to.
I was hungry, ___ I made a sandwich.
Brush your teeth ___ you go to bed.
Wait here ___ I come back.
I listened to music ___ I was cooking.
She didn't eat ___ she wasn't hungry.
I'll call you ___ as I get home.
The hotel was expensive. ___, it was very beautiful.
exercises.exp: However = tương phản giữa hai câu

exercises.q: ___ it was cold, she wasn't wearing a coat.
He was late ___ he missed the bus.
There was nothing on TV, ___ I went to bed.
I was cold, ___ I put on a jacket.
___ she was tired, she stayed up late.
He didn't come ___ he was sick.
The food was bad. ___, we ate it all.
exercises.exp: However = tương phản giữa hai câu

exercises.q: I'll call you ___ you arrive.
Do your homework ___ you watch TV.
She was happy ___ she got a new job.
He studied hard. ___, he failed the test.
exercises.exp: However nối hai câu tương phản

exercises.q: I listened to podcasts ___ I was driving.
We waited ___ the rain stopped.
___ it was expensive, I bought it.
She was nervous, ___ she spoke calmly.
Call me ___ soon as you know.
We will go ___ the weather is good.
I was bored, ___ I went for a walk.
She is kind. ___, she can be very strict.
exercises.exp: However = tương phản giữa hai câu

exercises.q: ___ it was late, we kept talking.
He saved money ___ he wanted to travel.
She turned off the lights ___ she left.
We played outside ___ it got dark.

reorder.words: I stayed home because it was raining
She was tired so she went to bed
Although it was cold she went swimming
He studied hard however he failed the exam
Call me when you arrive at the station
I will eat dinner after I finish work
Brush your teeth before you go to bed
She listened to music while she was cooking
We waited until the film started
He was hungry so he made some food
Although the film was long it was very good
I was bored so I went for a walk
The hotel was cheap however it was very clean
She didn't go out because she was tired
I will call you as soon as I arrive
He is young however he is very talented
She cried when she heard the news
Although she was sick she came to work
We stayed inside because it was raining
Wait here until I come back to you

passage.text: Last weekend I had a great day. I woke up early {{1}} the weather was beautiful. I decided to go to the park {{2}} I wanted some fresh air. {{3}} the park was crowded, I found a quiet spot under a tree. I read my book {{4}} I had some coffee. {{5}} it got a bit cloudy, I didn't go home {{6}} I finished my chapter. {{7}}, I called a friend {{8}} we went to a nearby café. {{9}} we ordered our food, we talked for hours. It was a perfect day {{10}} the weather changed in the evening.

Maria wanted to learn English, {{1}} she joined an online course. {{2}} the lessons were difficult, she enjoyed them. She studied every day {{3}} she went to bed. She listened to podcasts {{4}} she was cooking. {{5}} a few months, she felt more confident. {{6}}, she was still nervous about speaking. She signed up for a conversation class {{7}} she wanted more practice. {{8}} she walked into the first class, she felt scared. {{9}}, everyone was friendly. Now she speaks well {{10}} she still has a lot to learn.

Tom wanted to cook a special dinner. He went to the supermarket {{1}} he finished work. {{2}} he arrived, the shop was almost closed. He bought some pasta and vegetables {{3}} there was nothing else. He cooked the pasta {{4}} he prepared the sauce. {{5}} the sauce was a bit salty, it tasted quite good. He set the table {{6}} his girlfriend arrived. She came in {{7}} he was lighting the candles. She loved it. {{8}}, Tom was nervous the whole time. He will cook more often {{9}} she liked it {{10}} much.

My sister and I decided to go hiking. We woke up early {{1}} we wanted to reach the top before noon. {{2}} the path was steep, we didn't stop. We rested {{3}} we reached the halfway point. We ate some snacks {{4}} we looked at the view. {{5}}, the weather changed and dark clouds appeared. We walked faster {{6}} we didn't want to get wet. We reached the top {{7}} the storm started. {{8}} it rained heavily, we stayed under some trees. We waited {{9}} the rain stopped. {{10}}, it was one of the best days ever.

Jake wanted to buy a new laptop. He saved money for months {{1}} laptops are very expensive. {{2}} he had enough, he went to the electronics shop. He looked at many models {{3}} the salesperson helped him. One laptop was perfect {{4}} it was too heavy. {{5}}, there was a lighter version. It was more expensive, {{6}} Jake decided to buy it. He paid and left the shop {{7}} the shop closed. {{8}} he got home, he set it up. He was happy {{9}} it worked perfectly. {{10}}, he had to learn how to use the new software.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một chuyến đi hoặc sự kiện đáng nhớ gần đây của bạn. Hãy dùng ít nhất 4 từ nối khác nhau (because, so, although, however, when, before, after, while, until) để mô tả các sự kiện xảy ra, lý do và kết quả. Viết ít nhất 30 từ với nhiều chi tiết cụ thể.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: However, although, because, so, and time connectors
writing_prompts.example: Last month, I visited Da Lat with my family. We went because the weather was great in November. Although the journey was long, it was very comfortable. When we arrived, we went straight to the flower market. While we were walking around, it started to rain lightly, so we found a small café. However, we didn't mind because the coffee was delicious. After the rain stopped, we visited the valley. We stayed until it got dark. It was wonderful.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một lần bạn gặp khó khăn hoặc thử thách và cách bạn giải quyết. Dùng các từ nối để giải thích lý do (because), kết quả (so), sự tương phản (although, however) và thứ tự thời gian (when, before, after, while, until).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: However, although, because, so, and time connectors
hint_words: so I had to find a solution
writing_prompts.example: Last semester, I had to give a presentation in English. I was very nervous because my English was not confident. Although I prepared for two weeks, I still felt scared. However, I asked my teacher for advice, so I felt a little better. Before the day arrived, I practised every evening. While I was speaking, my voice shook. However, I kept going until I finished. When I sat down, my classmates clapped. It was difficult, but I was proud because I didn't give up.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một buổi sáng hoặc buổi tối điển hình của bạn, nêu rõ thứ tự các hoạt động xảy ra, lý do bạn làm những việc đó và những bất ngờ hay thay đổi gì xảy ra. Dùng các time connectors và connectors cho đủ chi tiết.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: However, although, because, so, and time connectors
writing_prompts.example: Every morning I wake up at six because I have early classes. Although I am sleepy, I get up immediately. Before I have breakfast, I shower and get dressed. While I eat, I check my phone for messages. However, I try not to spend too long on it. I leave the house early so I don't miss the bus. When I get to school, I review my notes until the lesson starts. After classes, I go to the library because I have homework. I stay there until the library closes.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về hai người bạn hoặc hai người thân có tính cách rất khác nhau. Dùng however và although để chỉ ra sự tương phản, và because, so để giải thích lý do và kết quả của các hành động của họ.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: However, although, because, so, and time connectors
hint_words: because they care about each other
writing_prompts.example: My brother and sister are very different people. My brother is quiet because he is naturally shy, so he avoids big parties. However, he is the kindest person I know. My sister loves talking and meeting people. Although she is very sociable, she also listens very well. Although they argue sometimes, they always make up quickly because they care deeply about each other. However, what I love most is that they help each other — she encourages him to be braver, and he helps her slow down and think.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một quyết định quan trọng bạn đã thực hiện (chọn trường, thay đổi sở thích, học một kỹ năng mới...). Giải thích lý do (because), kết quả (so), sự do dự hay khó khăn (although, however) và những gì xảy ra khi bạn thực hiện (when, after, before).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: However, although, because, so, and time connectors
hint_words: although it was hard at first
writing_prompts.example: Last year, I decided to learn guitar because I wanted a creative hobby. Although I had never played before, I bought a second-hand guitar and started lessons. Before my first lesson, I was very nervous. However, the teacher was patient, so I felt comfortable quickly. While I was practising, my fingers hurt a lot. Although it was painful, I didn't stop. After three months, I could play three full songs. When I played for my family, they were very happy. Because I worked hard, I am now much better. I will continue until I can play my favourite song perfectly.
